calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John S. Park, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Epi center Medspa, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Pop Labs, Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Margaret Mitchell Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $14,997.00
Attorney's Fees: $1825.00
Costs: $ 529.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $17,351.95
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
